title: Kaffee's Dual Ride (Updated)
description: A tiny mod that allows two players to sit on one horse, donkey, mule etc.
body:
official Update has been Released.

------

An updated version of the amazing mod by Kaffee enabling Dual riding! But now for the latest versions. 

This page will be archived as soon as Kaffee updates the Original mod!
The new version source code and issues can be reported to this [Github](https://github.com/NiuhiPlays/Updated_kaffees_dual_ride), keep in mind any issues might take a while to be fixed...  
  


  
  
  

```
Original Description

"Kaffee's Dual Ride
This is a tiny mod that allows two players to sit on a horse. It is required on Client and Server. It is licensed under GPLv3. Sourcecode available on [Github](https://github.com/0ql/kaffees_dual_ride)"
```
